name: Snarl Psalm
descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. Considered as a "Strike". {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Anger}. For each stack of {Anger} {Metaphor} consumed, deal an additional 2 instances of DMG.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. Inflict 1 stack of {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Considered as a "Strike". {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Anger}. For each stack of {Anger} {Metaphor} consumed, deal an additional 2 instances of DMG.

Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. Inflict 1 stack of {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Considered as a "Strike". {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Anger}. For each stack of {Anger} {Metaphor} consumed, deal an additional 2 instances of DMG.

Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Horla obtains [Energy:Arg3] Aliemus. Inflict 1 stack of {Vulnerable} on all enemies. Considered as a "Strike". {Leap}: Switch {Emotion} state to {Anger}. For each stack of {Anger} {Metaphor} consumed, deal an additional 2 instances of DMG.
